name_en: Chane✴️ 24B Autumn/Winter High-End Dinner Party Bag AS5038 Small lambskin is soft and smooth, metal color scheme is classic, logo engraving on handle is clear. Retro and versatile, can be carried by hand, over shoulder, or crossbody. Perfect size. 19*25*3cm
